entities.name: SOIL ACIDITY
entities.description: A major crop production constraint characterized by low soil pH in the highlands of Ethiopia

entities.name: SOUTHERN HIGHLANDS OF ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the on-farm liming experiment was conducted

entities.name: LIMING
entities.description: The practice of applying lime to amend soil acidity and improve soil properties

entities.name: SOIL PROPERTIES
entities.description: The physical and chemical characteristics of the soil, including pH and nutrient availability

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity, specifically the amount of crop harvested per unit area

entities.name: FARM INCOME
entities.description: The economic return generated from crop production

entities.name: ACIDIC NITISOLS
entities.description: A specific type of acidic soil with pH less than 5.5 found in Southern Ethiopia

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental layout used to test different liming rates with three replications

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: A measure of the acidity or alkalinity of the soil

entities.name: EXCHANGEABLE ACIDITY
entities.description: A measure of the acidity in the soil that can be exchanged with other ions

entities.name: AVAILABLE PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: The amount of phosphorus in the soil that is readily available for plant uptake

entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: The cereal crop used in the study to evaluate the effects of liming

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total organic matter produced by the barley plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested barley grains per unit area

entities.name: MARGINAL RATE OF RETURN
entities.description: An economic indicator used to determine the profitability of the lime application

entities.name: GROSS MARGIN
entities.description: The total revenue minus the variable costs of production
